pages.text:
GOVERNMENT OF TUVALU

THC Note: 125/07

The Tuvalu High Commission in Suva presents its compliments to the Secretariat of the

Bureau International des Exposition and has the honour to forward herewith the

Government of Tuvalu's Instruction of Accession for the latter to process.

The High Commission has the further honour to reaffirm the Government of Tuvalu's greatest desire to become a member of the Bureau International des Exposition and trust that all the documentations are in order to have its membership considered at the earliest convenience.

The Tuvalu High Commission in Suva avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the

Secretariat of the Bureau International des Exposition the assurances of its highest consideration.

Tuvalu High Commission

Suva 10# September, 2007
